command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = '' &DetailTaxGridScattering; select @message as message return

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a join m25$$partition$current m on a.stt_rec = m.stt_rec left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt left join dmtk c on b.tk_dt = c.tk left join dmtk d on b.tk_gghb = d.tk &GridDetailQueryLoadingJoin; where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec order by @@orderByClause

title.v: Lấy số liệu từ hóa đơn$$90
